chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1410 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 30.10.2025 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Balouch, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General a/w Nabi Bux Leghari, XEN West Division Khairpur ************** Respondent No.2 has filed comments; the same are taken on record. Mr. Humail Rafi Mahesar, Advocate, has filed vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6, which is also taken on record. Respondent No.2, XEN West Division, Khairpur, is present and states that the petitioner himself is involved in theft of water. It is further submitted that watercourse L-57 has been restored and all illegal pipes have been removed. Respondent No.2 is directed to lodge FIR(s) against all inhabitants found to be involved in theft of water. In view of the above, the present petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
